videos.title: CRUISE SHIP OPPORTUNITIES 2025
videos.description:
Living and working on board a cruise ship with people from all over the world is a unique and exciting experience.

If you're thinking about a career at sea, visit our website to apply online:
www.cti-usa.com/apply

We're currently hiring for a variety of positions for #Cunard, including:

Waiter/Waitress
Head Waiter
Wine Waiter
Bartender
Bar Supervisor
Hotel Assistant - Galley
Demi Chef de Partie
Commis de Cuisine
Housekeeper
Hotel Storekeeper
Asst. Hotel Storekeeper
Laundry Operative
Production Technician
Fitter Mechanics
Technical Ratings
Electrical Technicians
Ordinary Seamen
And More!

Don't miss this opportunity to be part of our dedicated team.
Apply now and set sail towards a rewarding career with Cunard Line!

videos.title: #CTIGroupNews - Cunard Names Queen Anne During Ceremony in Liverpool
videos.description: Cunard's newest ship was officially named, during an incredible ceremony in Liverpool. Crowds gathered on the waterfront to watch performances from Andrea Bocelli, the Royal Liverpool Philharmonic Orchestra, and the Liverpool Institute for Performing Arts. Whilst the City of Liverpool was announced as Godparent of Queen Anne in recognition of the long-lasting bond with our spiritual home. On behalf of the city, five distinguished Liverpool icons represented the city to officially name Queen Anne, followed by the traditional bottle smash moment.
